title: Away Goes
description: Exploring loss and plea for understanding.
lyrics: Please tell God, I'm begging you, I'm begging you, I'm begging you, I'm begging you, I'm begging you, I'm begging you not to do this right now. I'm begging you from every place I've ever stood and all I'll be. Don't do this right now, cause it all goes away anyway, anyway, anyway. Why do you want to rush the pain? Why do you want us to be insane? I'm begging you not to divide. I'm begging you to cry if you're crying and to feel before you become just the death, murder, cold over ice. I can't even understand your whys. I can't even understand your whys. And just hold that as truth for the end of everyone you know, cause it all goes away. In the end it all goes away. Stop with your judgement of me, because I go away too. I bet you don't know what it's like without me in your mind. I bet you don't know what it's like without the kindness that shows you everything that I've done. Every time I told you you were amazing and now you just sit there numb from any compliment I give you. Are you really that cool? Is your ego vortex running up because it falls down just like the cups of everyone that had their drink? Had a little too much wine and now they're off to the left and they've gone too much. They're yelling, it's a fight, it's just gone, I'm through it. I'm gonna go super. I'm gonna go super. I'm gonna go super saiyan and just destroy it all then. This is the only fault because it all goes away. In the end my dark disciple, my Sith, my man, my pair, my teammate, we all die too. I'm sorry you're choosing this view, because you're no better than anyone you know. But I'm gonna tell you this one time, if you're in the zone, you ask for help and if you're given help, then you better reciprocate that circular thought, that motion, because if you don't, your time's coming soon, cause it all goes away. Through the light, burst through the time, spiral through the everything, that makes the universe whole. The red dwarfs to the supernovas, the black hole of despair and the void that got us here. It all goes away. You think your time's a little fast, you think you got more, gotta make it last then. 1.5 seconds, it's over. Did you tell your loved ones, you loved them, because it all goes away. Whether you hold on, you throw it, or you just walk, it all goes away. So treasure that life, and treasure your ride, to find the things that make you happy. Stop shitting on everyone else's, because one day you'll see that you can't fucking do that, ok? If you're gonna continue to do that, we're gonna kick your fucking ass, ok? I'm not saying we're taking out this world, that's your mother job.
